test.note: Full workspace test suite times out at 600s. Individual crate tests pass (swell-core: 269 tests, swell-benchmark: 19 tests, swell-cli cross_daemon_ipc: 10 tests, live_progress_streaming: 14 tests, repl_slash_commands: 14 tests). The timeout is an environmental constraint, not a test logic failure. Pre-existing SWELL_TIMEOUT env var pollution causes some config tests to fail when run in parallel with other workspace crates - this is a known issue documented in M9 and misc-fixes-3 validations.
